query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services WHERE externalId LIKE 'IPTEL-%') as iptel_stubs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services WHERE externalId LIKE 'RVC-STUB-%') as rvc_stubs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE billingPlatforms LIKE '%DataGate%') as datagate_customers,
  (SELECT ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost),2) FROM services WHERE externalId LIKE 'IPTEL-%') as iptel_total_cost;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services WHERE externalId LIKE 'IPTEL-%') as iptel_stubs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services WHERE externalId LIKE 'RVC-STUB-%') as rvc_stubs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE billingPlatforms LIKE '%DataGate%') as datagate_customers,
  (SELECT ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost),2) FROM services WHERE externalId LIKE 'IPTEL-%') as iptel_total_cost;
